programme.desc: New Zealand v South Africa. Coverage of the second T20 in the five-match series from Seddon Park in Hamilton. These two sides haven't met in a T20 series since a two-match contest back in 2015. South Africa won the first match by six wickets before the hosts replied with a 32-run victory to tie the series. Martin Guptill hit 60 for New Zealand in that second game to help the Kiwi's to 177-7 in their 20 overs, before South Africa were restricted to 145-8 in their reply.
